news.t: IronHorse Capital Transfers Listing of Conductor Global Equity Value ETF (Ticker: CGV) to New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) Floor

holdings.infoBox: CGV is an equity ETF with a total of 90 individual holdings. The top holdings are Cash & Cash Equivalents stock at 3.15%, Kandenko at 2.69%, DPM Metals at 2.54%, Cohu, Inc. at 2.30%, and LG Innotek at 2.28%.

overview.description: The Conductor Global Equity Value ETF (CGV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed fund of equity securities issued by companies globally, that exhibit value characteristics. Holdings are selected using technical, fundamental, and quantitative analyses. CGV was launched on Aug 1, 2022 and is issued by Conductor Fund.

data.title: IronHorse Capital Transfers Listing of Conductor Global Equity Value ETF (Ticker: CGV) to New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) Floor
data.text: NEW YORK , Feb. 20, 2024 /PRNewswire/ -- IronHorse Capital, a leading provider of innovative investment solutions, today announced its decision to transfer the listing of the Conductor Global Equity V...
